summary: Completed full system test for The Doggy Company. All 8 requested features are working correctly: Product Box save works without errors, RSVP creates notifications in all 3 systems (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes), Event registration creates notifications, Admin notifications endpoint returns RSVP notifications, and the notification bell dropdown shows all notifications properly.

minor.issue: Event lookup was using 'event_id' field but seeded data uses 'id' field - FIXED by adding $or query

1_product_box_save.details: Product edit modal opens correctly, save button works, 'Saved! Product saved successfully' toast appears. No errors.

2_rsvp_notification_flow.details: RSVP creates entries in: admin_notifications (type: enjoy_rsvp), service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes. All 3 systems receive the notification.

3_adopt_event_registration.details: Event registration creates notifications in all 3 systems. Fixed event lookup to support both 'id' and 'event_id' fields.

4_admin_notifications_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/notifications returns notifications including RSVP type (enjoy_rsvp) and event registration type (adopt_event_registration).

5_service_desk_tickets.details: RSVP tickets appear in service_desk_tickets collection with proper metadata (rsvp_id, experience_id, customer info).

6_unified_inbox.details: RSVPs appear in channel_intakes collection with request_type: enjoy_rsvp.

7_product_box_ui.details: Edit button opens product editor modal with all fields (Product Name, Type, Image URL, Description, Category, Tags, etc.). Save works correctly.

8_auto_ticket_creation.details: ticket_auto_creation module creates all 3 entries (notification, ticket, inbox) when events occur.

9_notification_bell_dropdown.details: Notification bell shows 115+ new notifications. RSVP notifications ('New RSVP: Weekend Dog Park Meetup') and Event Registration notifications visible in dropdown.

api_tests.rsvp_create: PASS - POST /api/enjoy/rsvp creates RSVP and notifications
api_tests.event_registration: PASS - POST /api/adopt/events/{id}/register creates registration and notifications
api_tests.admin_notifications: PASS - GET /api/admin/notifications returns all notification types

updated_files: /app/backend/adopt_routes.py - Fixed event lookup to support both 'id' and 'event_id' fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing experience exp-dogpark-mumbai for RSVP testing, event-16393fa2 for event registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All notification flows are working. RSVP creates entries in admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, and channel_intakes. Product Box save works correctly. The notification bell dropdown shows all notifications including RSVP and event registration types. Fixed adopt_routes.py to support both 'id' and 'event_id' field names for event lookup.

verified_flows.event_registration_to_notifications: Event Registration -> admin_notifications (type: adopt_event_registration) + service_desk_tickets + channel_intakes
verified_flows.product_box_save: Edit Product -> Save -> Success toast 'Product saved successfully'
